headlines.title: Opening Day Just 3 Days Away; Roster Decisions Finalized
headlines.summary: The Mariners are just three sleeps away from Opening Day on March 26 against Cleveland. Final roster decisions made, Colt Emerson reassigned to minors.

headlines.title: Randy Arozarena and Cal Raleigh Settle Their 'Beef'
headlines.summary: The two Mariners stars released mutual statements putting their public disagreement behind them.

details.openingDay: March 26 vs Cleveland Guardians at T-Mobile Park
keyUpdates: Colt Emerson reassigned to minor league camp after impressive spring
Randy Arozarena and Cal Raleigh settled their public disagreement
First Mariners commercial of 2026 released featuring Dan Wilson and Bryce Miller
Former Mariners Ty France makes Padres Opening Day roster
Dylan Moore signs MLB deal with Philadelphia Phillies

headlines.title: Seahawks Exercise Fifth-Year Options on JSN and Devon Witherspoon
headlines.summary: Seahawks lock in 2023 first-rounders through 2027. JSN's option: $23.85M, Witherspoon's: $21.16M. Both fully guaranteed.

details.bigNews: Seahawks exercised fifth-year options for two young stars — WR Jaxon Smith-Njigba ($23.8M for 2027) and CB Devon Witherspoon ($21.1M for 2027).
details.jsnDetails: Smith-Njigba was first-team All-Pro, led NFL in receiving yards (1,793), and won AP Offensive Player of the Year — only the second Seahawk ever after Shaun Alexander.
details.draft: Being linked to CB Chris Johnson in early mock drafts after losing Riq Woolen to Eagles.

headlines.title: Kraken Lose 5-2 to Blue Jackets - Playoff Hopes Fading
headlines.summary: Third straight loss. Now 2 points behind Nashville for final playoff spot with 13 games remaining. Jared McCann injured.

details.situation: Kraken have lost 4 straight games and tumbled out of a playoff spot.
details.playoffPicture: Now 2 points behind Nashville Predators for final wild card spot with only 13 games remaining.
keyIssues: Need to win at least 8 of final 13 to have a chance

last_game.highlights: Third straight loss, playoff hopes fading fast

headlines.title: Sounders Advance to Concacaf Champions Cup Quarterfinals
headlines.summary: Beat Vancouver 5-2 on aggregate. Play Minnesota United today at 11:30 AM PT. Will face Tigres UANL next.

details.achievement: Advanced to Concacaf Champions Cup Quarterfinals with 2-1 win over Vancouver (5-2 aggregate).
details.nextRound: Will face Mexican powerhouse Tigres UANL in next round.
details.today: Playing Minnesota United TODAY at 11:30 AM PT
